description: Localize the Socioboard authentication UI to Spanish using Laravel's internationalization features. Using the translation glossary provided at ~/es_translations.json, update the login views in /opt/socioboard/socioboard-web-php/resources/views/ and create the corresponding Spanish language files in /opt/socioboard/socioboard-web-php/resources/lang/es/. Configure the application's default locale to 'es' and ensure the login page at http://localhost/login displays the translated content.
